summary: FASE 3 Villa Paris testing complete. All backend APIs (16/16) and frontend features tested successfully. Report settimanale/mensile/annuale with correct spam policy, dashboard complete with real KPIs, Excel export validated, PDF export functional, sidebar fully scrollable on small viewports.
context_for_next_testing_agent: FASE 3 verified: /api/report/stats supports period=week/month/year with spamMode=policy. Spam policy correctly applied (week=include visible in red, month/year=exclude). /api/report/azienda.xlsx returns valid Excel file. Dashboard (/dashboard) shows real KPIs from report API. Sidebar scroll area has overflow-y:auto and works on 500px viewport. PDF export via jsPDF doesn't break the page.

login_admin.details: Login with admin@villaparis.local / Admin123! works, redirects to /dashboard

dashboard_page.details: Dashboard loads with KPI cards, filter section, sources/operators/policy sections, quick actions

dashboard_real_kpis.details: Shows real metrics: Contatti Principali, Appuntamenti, Interazioni, Tempo Dedicato, Eventi

report_azienda_page.details: Report page loads with FASE 3 badge, filters, KPI cards, charts, tables

report_period_week.details: Week period shows spam visible in red policy, 7-day trend

report_period_month.details: Month period excludes spam from counts, 28-31 day trend

report_period_year.details: Year period excludes spam from counts, 12-month trend

report_filter_by_source.details: Filtering by source (e.g., matrimonio.com) returns only matching clients

excel_export.details: GET /api/report/azienda.xlsx returns valid xlsx file (PK zip format, >1KB)

pdf_export.details: PDF export button works, doesn't break the page

sidebar_scroll.details: Sidebar nav has overflow-y:auto, scrollHeight(864) > clientHeight(282), fully scrollable on 500px viewport

charts_display.details: Trend periodo, Provenienza lead, Operatori coinvolti charts all render

tables_display.details: Riepilogo operatori, Dettaglio clienti e attività, Attività registrate tables all render

api_verification.GET /api/report/stats: 200 - Returns OperationalReportResponse with meta, summary, sources, operators, trend, clients, activities
api_verification.POST /api/auth/login: 200 - Returns user info and sets vp_token cookie

ui_verification.dashboard_page: Full hero, KPI cards, filters, sources/operators/policy cards, next event, activities, recent events, quick actions
ui_verification.report_azienda_page: Hero with export buttons, filters card, policy banner, KPI cards, charts, operator/client/activity tables
ui_verification.sidebar_on_small_viewport: Scrollable, 'Nuovo Evento' button visible, user info visible at bottom
